notes: Downloaded for real public smoke run; extracted and converted into filtered_feature_bc_matrix/ for entrypoint tests. Terms: https://www.10xgenomics.com/legal/terms-of-use (accessed 2026-03-04).
Downloaded for scRNA baseline/advanced benchmarks (10x v3 feature-barcode matrix). Terms: https://www.10xgenomics.com/legal/terms-of-use (accessed 2026-03-04).

Alias id used in docs/CLAIMS.tsv + docs/DATA_PLAN.md; points to the same PBMC 10k v3 tarball as 10x_PBMC_10k_v3_scRNA_2018_S3. Terms: https://www.10xgenomics.com/legal/terms-of-use (accessed 2026-03-04).

Multi-input integration pair for advanced runners: batch1=PBMC3k (v1 layout, converted); batch2=PBMC 10k v3 (v3 layout). Used for scVI/Harmony integration compares. Terms: https://www.10xgenomics.com/legal/terms-of-use (accessed 2026-03-04).

Canonical 10x Visium sample (human lymph node): filtered_feature_bc_matrix + spatial/ metadata; used for visium baseline smoke and cross-env reproducibility evidence. Terms: https://www.10xgenomics.com/legal/terms-of-use (accessed 2026-03-04).

Primary spatial anchor (mouse brain, sagittal anterior). Public 10x example ships counts as H5 + spatial.tar.gz; pipeline accepts H5 in place of filtered_feature_bc_matrix/. Terms: https://www.10xgenomics.com/legal/terms-of-use (accessed 2026-03-04).

Mouse brain tissue-matched scRNA reference distributed via Seurat spatial mapping vignette; underlying dataset described as Allen Institute adult mouse cortical taxonomy (SMART-Seq2; Tasic et al., Nat Neurosci 2016). Use `subclass` labels as the reference label set (exported to `reference_labels.tsv`). See Allen Institute Terms of Use for noncommercial reuse.
